creator: dhagan@cs.vt.edu
text:
It seems, to be frank, rather stupid to have a version of Elm with Y2K
problems on the next release CD.  Does anyone plan on committing this?  
Is there a problem with the patch, or just a general hang-up on getting it
done?

Cheers,

Daniel

-- 
Daniel Hagan                                             Computer Science CSE
dhagan@cs.vt.edu                                http://www.cs.vt.edu/~dhagan/
